ground_truth.summary: Kairo Phantom Project Overview Kairo Phantom is a verifiable document intelligence system designed for local-first operations.
key_claims: Every extraction must be grounded or it is blocked.
The system maintains a local SQLite database for provenance tracking.
User privacy is protected because all computations are done locally on-device.

ground_truth.summary: Verifiable RAG Systems in 2026 Standard Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems are notorious for hallucinating information that doesn't exist in the source document corpus.
key_claims: Standard RAG systems suffer from high hallucination rates.
The grounding cascade filters out ungrounded responses before rendering.
Cosine similarity threshold for semantic matches is set to 0.86.

ground_truth.summary: Local-First Software Development The local-first software movement prioritizes user ownership of data, offline support, and security.
key_claims: Local-first software provides superior privacy and offline capabilities.
Ollama enables fully offline local LLM completions.
Open-core model builds trust with developers and users alike.
